# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  UserFilesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: user-uploaded-files-and-backups
  ApplicationRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: S3FullAccessPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationIAMRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::user-uploaded-files-and-backups/*
  ApplicationIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
